prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle gain and strength improvement for weightlifting competition

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals distributed throughout
Protein intake distributed across meals (minimum 25g per meal) supporting muscle recovery
Pre-workout and post-workout nutrition specified with appropriate timing and macronutrients
Total daily calories and macros align with strength athlete requirements for muscle gain
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) focusing on protein distribution, muscle recovery, and pre/post-workout nutrition windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain lean muscle while cutting 2kg for competition weight in boxing

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 1,800-2,000 calories with adequate protein (minimum 120g) for lean muscle maintenance
Includes 3-4 liters of hydration strategy distributed throughout the day
Provides 4-5 balanced meals/snacks with carbs timed around training for performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport requiring weight management (boxer or swimmer) emphasizing caloric control, hydration balance, and lean muscle maintenance while meeting performance demands

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with carbohydrate loading and high caloric intake (4500+ calories) with meals timed around a 20km training run

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers exactly 1 day with 4-5 meals/snacks
Total daily calories meet or exceed 4500 with carbohydrates comprising 60-65% of total intake
Pre-run meal provided 2-3 hours before training and post-run recovery meal within 30-60 minutes of completion
Plan is presented in compact, concise format suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring maximum caloric intake and carbohydrate loading with specific timing around training sessions
